For 600063, keep profit-protection hold while low remains above 7.17; if it gaps or fades sharply, reassess trailing protection before any new buying.
Do not average down 600210, 600157, or 002195; require MA20 reclaim and relative-strength repair before any risk expansion.
For 600276, treat as a rotation candidate only if it holds above MA20 and the source name being reduced has objectively weaker trend/risk profile.
